Hero.title: True Cinnamon
Hero.description: Discover the exquisite aroma and refined taste of genuine Ceylon Cinnamon, harvested directly from our heritage plantations.

Footer.brandDesc: Bringing the finest Ceylon Cinnamon from our plantations directly to your table. Experience the true aroma and health benefits of authentic cinnamon.

Home.introDesc: A Cinnamon variety native to Sri Lanka and is grown and manufactured in Sri Lanka is known as Ceylon Cinnamon or True Cinnamon. Produced from the plant Cinnamomum zeylanicum, pure Ceylon Cinnamon is celebrated globally for its delicate flavor, unique aroma, and numerous health benefits. Unlike common Cassia cinnamon, our True Cinnamon is ultra-low in coumarin and rich in antioxidants.

About.headerDesc: The story of True Cinnamon is the story of Sri Lanka's finest spice.
About.processDesc1: Processing and peeling Ceylon Cinnamon follows a tradition and a method unique to Sri Lanka. Leaves and twigs are separated from the harvested stick before peeling. Peeling cinnamon sticks is a complex skill to master, requiring dextrous handwork and a traditional set of tools.
About.processDesc2: The end result of peeling is a delicate and long cinnamon stick carved out of the soft inner layer of the bark. Similar to a cigar in structure, Ceylon Cinnamon is pale golden in colour while sweet and refined in flavour and fragrance.

benefits.lowCoumarinDesc: Contains only 0.004% coumarin compared to Cassia's 5%, making it safe for daily consumption liver-friendly.
benefits.cognitiveDesc: Consuming Ceylon Cinnamon improves cognition, increases focus, and memory.
benefits.bloodSugarDesc: Helps regulate blood sugar levels and increases insulin sensitivity.
benefits.skinHealthDesc: Cinnamon oil helps reduce skin diseases like acne and eczema.
benefits.antioxidantDesc: Packed with powerful antioxidants that reduce inflammation.
benefits.heartHealthDesc: Reduces risk of heart diseases by lowering cholesterol levels.
